# Endoscopy Wave 2 Category Pack

## Required Fields

- Manufacturer, model, variant;
- endoscope type;
- single-use/reusable;
- working length;
- outer diameter;
- channel diameter;
- compatible monitors/processors;
- sterile status;
- accessories.

## Required Documents

- Registration certificate;
- IFU;
- datasheet/product sheet;
- compatibility list;
- cleaning/reprocessing manual for reusable devices.

## Key Characteristics

- Field of view;
- working length;
- distal end diameter;
- working channel;
- direction of view;
- monitor compatibility;
- sterile/single-use status;
- package contents.

## Compatibility Requirements

- Video processors;
- monitors;
- light sources;
- insufflators;
- accessories;
- sterilization/reprocessing systems.

## Common Conflicts

- Product family has multiple sizes.
- Monitor compatibility changes by generation.
- Single-use warnings are omitted in brochures.
- Reprocessing requirements differ by model.

## Review Notes

Compatibility and single-use/reprocessing claims require IFU-level evidence.
